notFoundDescription: The requested vendor could not be found.

coBidding.title: Co-Bidding Pattern Detected
coBidding.description: This vendor frequently appears in the same procedures with specific partners.
coBidding.noPatternsDescription: Requires ≥3 shared competitive procedures with another vendor

cards.institutionalRelationshipsNote: Long-tenured vendor relationships correlate with higher single-bid rates and prices (Coviello & Gagliarducci 2017)
cards.procurementFootprintNote: Sector × institution relationships, sized by total value
cards.footprintLegend: Color = sector · badge = avg risk score · sorted by total value

risk.sortByRisk: Sort by risk and go to highest

history.calendarDescription: Contract activity over the last 5 years. Darker cells indicate more contracts in that month.
history.noCalendarData: No contract date data available for calendar view.

network.networkGraphDescription: Explore the full vendor relationship network with interactive graph visualization.

flags.highDirectAward: {{pct}}% of contracts were direct awards (bypassed competitive tendering)
flags.highSingleBid: {{pct}}% of competitive procedures had only this vendor bidding
flags.suspiciousCoBidding: Suspicious co-bidding patterns detected (heuristic analysis — not included in the v6.5 ML risk score, which assigns co_bid_rate a coefficient of 0.000)
flags.highClustering: High network clustering ({{pct}}%) — bidding partners form a tightly-knit group
flags.primaryDriver: Primary driver: {{factor}} (z={{z}} — {{z}} SDs above sector average)

waterfall.description: Positive bars increase risk (red/orange). Negative bars reduce risk (green). Bar height reflects each factor's contribution to the overall score.

priceVolatility.title: Price Volatility
priceVolatility.description: This vendor's contract amounts vary significantly more than sector peers — a top predictor of corruption risk in the v6.5 model.

ghostRisk.title: Ghost Company Risk
ghostRisk.description: This vendor shows structural patterns consistent with ghost companies: new, minimal activity, concentrated awards.

yearEnd.title: Year-End Concentration
yearEnd.description: December contracts bypass normal review cycles — a timing anomaly associated with budget dumping.

protectiveFactors.title: Protective Factors
protectiveFactors.description: These factors lower the risk score — the model treats them as signals of legitimate operations.

histogram.title: Contract Size Distribution
histogram.description: 3M MXN threshold marks the single-tender limit. Clusters just below the line may indicate threshold splitting.
